torch_pattern: torch.nn.functional.silu(gate) * up  # SwiGLU: gate, up = linear branches sharing input x

config_template.notes: Two sibling linear projections (gate_proj, up_proj) share input x; silu applied to gate branch then elementwise mul with up branch. Alternative single-matmul form: t, gate = ttnn.chunk(fused_proj_out, 2, -1); t * ttnn.silu(gate)

weight_transform: optional: concat(w_gate, w_up) along output dim into one fused projection, then ttnn.chunk(out, 2, -1)
applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: gate = ttnn.linear(x, w_gate); up = ttnn.linear(x, w_up); out = ttnn.mul(ttnn.silu(gate), up)

placement_observations.source: gate_silu = ttnn.silu(gate_o, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); gated = ttnn.mul(gate_silu, up_o, ..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); then resharded to DRAM-sharded for down projection (K_tiles=96 'wins big with DRAM-sharded')

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, seq, intermediate_size] MLP gate output, prefill-sized
placement_observations.source: SwiGLU MLP forward: gate = ttnn.linear(x, self.w_gate); gate = ttnn.silu(gate); up = ttnn.linear(x, self.w_up); hidden = ttnn.mul(gate, up) (no explicit memory_config -> default DRAM interleaved)
